lettuce_sync.signature: List<Long> jsonArrappend(K key, JsonPath jsonPath, JsonValue... values)

params.name: key
params.description: the key holding the JSON document.

params.name: jsonPath
params.description: the JsonPath pointing to the array inside the document.

returns.description: Long the resulting size of the arrays after the new data was appended, or null if the path does not exist. @since 6.8

params.description: The JSON value to append after the last array element.

returns.description: The array length after the append operation.
